Scheme Name: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (CMCHIS)
Launched By / Year: TN Govt, 2009 (as Kalaignar Kaappittu Thittam); current run via United India Insurance till 2027
What It Covers: Cashless treatment: 1090 procedures, 8 follow-up procedures, 52 diagnostic tests across ~800 govt + 900 private empanelled hospitals
Eligibility: TN resident family, annual income below Rs.1,20,000, name on family/ration card
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Up to Rs.5,00,000 per family per year (floater basis)
How to Apply: Apply online at cmchistn.com with ration card, Aadhaar, income certificate

Scheme Name: Nammai Kaakkum 48 (NK-48)
What It Covers: Free emergency treatment for road accident victims within first 48 hours of accident, at any hospital (govt or private)
Eligibility: Any road accident victim in Tamil Nadu, regardless of insurance status
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free treatment for first 48 hours post-accident
How to Apply: Automatic on admission to empanelled hospital after accident

Scheme Name: Dr. Muthulakshmi Reddy Maternity Benefit Scheme
What It Covers: Financial assistance to pregnant women for nutrition and delivery expenses
Eligibility: Pregnant women (especially first 2 deliveries), TN resident
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Cash assistance in installments (amount revised periodically)
How to Apply: Apply through nearest Govt hospital / PHC / Anganwadi
Official Source / Helpline: TN Dept of Health & Family Welfare

Scheme Name: Amma Mini Clinics (Amma Clinics)
What It Covers: Free outpatient consultation, basic diagnostics, free medicines for common ailments at urban primary health level
Eligibility: All residents, especially urban poor
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free OP consultation + medicines
How to Apply: Walk-in at Amma Clinic locations in urban areas
Official Source / Helpline: TN Health Dept / Greater Chennai Corporation

Scheme Name: Makkalai Thedi Maruthuvam (Doorstep Healthcare Scheme)
What It Covers: Doorstep screening for non-communicable diseases (diabetes, hypertension) and medicine delivery for elderly/bedridden
Eligibility: Elderly, bedridden, and chronic disease patients in rural/semi-urban areas
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free home-based screening and medicine delivery
How to Apply: Through local Health Sub-Centre / village health nurse visits

Scheme Name: Patham Pathukappom Thittam
What It Covers: Preventing diabetic foot complications through screening and footcare for diabetic patients
Eligibility: Diabetic patients registered under TN public health system
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free foot screening and preventive care
How to Apply: Through Govt hospitals / NCD clinics

Scheme Name: National Dialysis Programme (TN component)
What It Covers: Subsidised/free hemodialysis and peritoneal dialysis for End Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) patients at District Hospitals
Eligibility: ESRD patients, priority to BPL/CMCHIS-eligible patients
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free or highly subsidised dialysis sessions at District Hospital dialysis centres
How to Apply: Register at District Hospital dialysis centre

Scheme Name: Pudhumai Penn Thittam
What It Covers: Monthly financial assistance to girl students from govt schools to continue education up to graduation (indirectly improves health/nutrition access)
Eligibility: Girl students who studied in TN govt schools from class 6 to 12, joining govt UG colleges
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Rs.1,000/month during course of study
How to Apply: Apply through college / TN e-Governance portal

Scheme Name: Naan Mudhalvan Thittam
What It Covers: Skill development and employability scheme for students/youth (includes health & paramedical skilling tracks)
Eligibility: TN college students and youth
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free skill training, certification, job linkage
How to Apply: Register on naanmudhalvan.tn.gov.in

Scheme Name: Chief Minister's Breakfast Scheme
What It Covers: Free nutritious breakfast for govt school children to improve child nutrition and health outcomes
Eligibility: Children studying in TN govt primary schools
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free daily breakfast
How to Apply: Automatic for enrolled govt school students

Scheme Name: 108 Ambulance Service (TN)
What It Covers: Free emergency ambulance response and transport to nearest hospital
Eligibility: All TN residents, any emergency
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free ambulance pickup and transport
How to Apply: Call 108

Scheme Name: TN Chief Minister's Multi Super Speciality Hospital Free Treatment
Launched By / Year: TN Govt, Omandurar Govt Estate, Chennai
What It Covers: Free advanced multi-speciality treatment including cardiology, neurology, oncology
Eligibility: All patients, priority to economically weaker sections
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free / highly subsidised tertiary care
How to Apply: Walk-in / referral from district hospital

Scheme Name: Innuyir Kappom Thittam
What It Covers: Free medical treatment to road accident victims, precursor/companion scheme to NK-48 covering wider trauma care
Eligibility: Road accident victims in Tamil Nadu
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free trauma treatment at network hospitals
How to Apply: Automatic on hospital admission post-accident

Scheme Name: Prevention & Control of Haemoglobinopathies Programme (Sickle Cell & Thalassemia Screening)
Launched By / Year: TN Govt, since 2017, first South Indian state
What It Covers: Screening for Sickle Cell Anaemia & Thalassemia among tribal adolescents (class 10/12) and antenatal mothers in 30 tribal blocks across 14 districts
Eligibility: Tribal students aged 14+, school dropouts, antenatal mothers in tribal blocks
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free screening and counselling
How to Apply: Through school health screening camps / PHC in tribal blocks

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu School Dental Health Programme
What It Covers: Free dental check-up and basic treatment for school children
Eligibility: Children in TN govt and govt-aided schools
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free dental screening and treatment
How to Apply: Through school health camps

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Government Free Spectacles Scheme
What It Covers: Free spectacles for school children identified with refractive errors during eye screening
Eligibility: School children in govt schools with vision problems
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free spectacles
How to Apply: Through school eye screening camp

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Marriage Assistance & Health Card for Widows
What It Covers: Health and financial support benefits bundled with welfare assistance for widows
Eligibility: Widows registered under TN Social Welfare schemes
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Cash assistance + access to govt health facilities
How to Apply: Apply at Taluk Social Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Free Cancer Treatment Scheme (Govt Cancer Institute, Chennai)
Launched By / Year: TN Govt, Govt Royapettah / Adyar Cancer Institute
What It Covers: Free/subsidised cancer diagnosis, chemotherapy, radiotherapy, and surgery
Eligibility: All cancer patients, priority to CMCHIS/BPL cardholders
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free to highly subsidised cancer treatment
How to Apply: Referral or direct walk-in to Cancer Institute, Adyar, Chennai

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Free Heart Surgery Scheme (Govt Multi-Speciality / Institute of Cardiology)
Launched By / Year: TN Govt, Madras Medical College / Govt General Hospital Chennai
What It Covers: Free or subsidised cardiac surgeries including bypass, valve replacement
Eligibility: CMCHIS-eligible patients and walk-in referrals
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Covered under CMCHIS / free at Govt Institute of Cardiology
How to Apply: Referral from district hospital to Institute of Cardiology, Chennai

Scheme Name: Anaemia Mukt Bharat (TN implementation)
What It Covers: Anaemia testing & treatment, Iron-Folic Acid supplementation for children, adolescents, pregnant women, biannual deworming
Eligibility: Children 1-19 yrs, pregnant/lactating women, adolescents
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free IFA tablets/syrup, free deworming tablets
How to Apply: Through Anganwadi Centre / School Health Programme

Scheme Name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
What It Covers: Cashless secondary & tertiary hospitalization care across empanelled govt + private hospitals nationwide
Eligibility: Families identified per SECC 2011 deprivation criteria (mainly rural/urban poor); TN runs CMCHIS as its equivalent/converged scheme
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Up to Rs.5,00,000 per family per year
How to Apply: Check eligibility on pmjay.gov.in or via Common Service Centres

Scheme Name: Ayushman Bharat Health and Wellness Centres (AB-HWC) / Ayushman Arogya Mandir
What It Covers: Comprehensive primary healthcare incl. NCD screening, maternal & child health, free diagnostics and medicines at sub-centre/PHC level
Eligibility: All residents in catchment area of the centre
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free OP consultation, free essential drugs & diagnostics
How to Apply: Walk-in at nearest Health & Wellness Centre

Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri National Dialysis Programme (PMNDP)
Launched By / Year: Govt of India, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare
What It Covers: Free dialysis services for poor patients with End Stage Renal Disease at District Hospitals (PPP model)
Eligibility: BPL and economically weak ESRD patients (priority); implemented state-wise including TN
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free hemodialysis/peritoneal dialysis sessions
How to Apply: Register at District Hospital dialysis unit

Scheme Name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
What It Covers: Cash assistance for institutional delivery to reduce maternal & neonatal mortality
Eligibility: Pregnant women, especially BPL/SC/ST, delivering in govt or accredited private facilities
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Cash incentive (varies rural/urban, amount per state norms)
How to Apply: Apply through ASHA worker / Govt hospital at time of delivery

Scheme Name: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram (JSSK)
What It Covers: Free delivery (incl. C-section) and free treatment for sick newborns, with free drugs, diagnostics, diet, transport
Eligibility: All pregnant women and sick infants up to 1 year, in public health facilities
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Completely free maternal and newborn care package
How to Apply: Through Govt hospital at time of admission

Scheme Name: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK)
What It Covers: Child health screening (4 D's: Defects, Diseases, Deficiencies, Developmental delays) and free treatment/surgery referral
Eligibility: Children aged 0-18 years
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free screening + free treatment/surgery for identified conditions
How to Apply: Through Anganwadi/school health screening camps

Scheme Name: Rashtriya Arogya Nidhi (RAN)
Launched By / Year: Govt of India, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare
What It Covers: Financial assistance to BPL patients for treatment of life-threatening diseases (cancer, heart disease, kidney etc.) at govt hospitals
Eligibility: BPL families needing treatment at listed govt super-speciality hospitals
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Financial assistance up to Rs.15 lakh (case basis)
How to Apply: Apply through Medical Superintendent of treating govt hospital

Scheme Name: Health Minister's Discretionary Grant (HMDG)
Launched By / Year: Govt of India, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare
What It Covers: One-time financial grant to economically poor patients for hospitalization expenses
Eligibility: Indian citizens below poverty line needing urgent treatment
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Discretionary grant amount (case-by-case)
How to Apply: Apply through Ministry of Health & Family Welfare

Scheme Name: National Tobacco Control Programme (NTCP)
What It Covers: Awareness, cessation support and de-addiction services for tobacco users
Eligibility: All residents, esp. tobacco users seeking de-addiction help
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free counselling and cessation support at District Tobacco Cessation Centres
How to Apply: Visit District Hospital NTCP cessation centre

Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan (PMSMA)
What It Covers: Free, fixed-day antenatal checkups (incl. high-risk pregnancy identification) by specialists
Eligibility: All pregnant women, free for high-risk cases
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free antenatal checkup on 9th of every month at PHC/CHC
How to Apply: Visit PHC/CHC on PMSMA day (9th of month)

Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana (PMBJP)
What It Covers: Affordable generic medicines through Jan Aushadhi Kendras
Eligibility: All citizens
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medicines at 50-90% lower cost than branded equivalents
How to Apply: Purchase at nearest Jan Aushadhi Kendra

Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
Launched By / Year: Govt of India, Ministry of Finance
What It Covers: Accidental death and disability insurance
Eligibility: Bank account holders, age 18-70
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Rs.2,00,000 for accidental death/full disability, Rs.20/year premium
How to Apply: Apply through bank linked to Aadhaar/account

Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
Launched By / Year: Govt of India, Ministry of Finance
What It Covers: Life insurance cover (any cause of death)
Eligibility: Bank/post office account holders, age 18-50
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Rs.2,00,000 life cover, premium ~Rs.436/year
How to Apply: Apply through bank linked to Aadhaar/account

Scheme Name: Employees' State Insurance Scheme (ESIC)
Launched By / Year: Govt of India, Ministry of Labour & Employment
What It Covers: Comprehensive medical care, sickness, maternity & disability cash benefits for organised sector workers
Eligibility: Employees earning up to wage ceiling in ESI-covered establishments
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free medical treatment at ESI hospitals/dispensaries + cash benefits
How to Apply: Automatic enrolment via employer; ESIC card issued

Scheme Name: Central Government Health Scheme (CGHS)
Launched By / Year: Govt of India, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare
What It Covers: Comprehensive healthcare (OPD, IPD, diagnostics, medicines) for central govt employees & pensioners
Eligibility: Serving/retired central government employees and dependents
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Cashless treatment at CGHS wellness centres & empanelled hospitals
How to Apply: Apply through CGHS card via employer/pension office

Scheme Name: PM-Ayushman Bharat Health Infrastructure Mission (PM-ABHIM)
What It Covers: Strengthening public health infrastructure - critical care blocks, diagnostic labs, public health units at district/block level
Eligibility: General public (infrastructure-level scheme, indirect beneficiary)
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Improved diagnostic and critical care facility access at Govt hospitals
How to Apply: N/A - infrastructure scheme implemented via state health depts

Scheme Name: Ayushman Bhav Campaign
What It Covers: Saturation drive to ensure every eligible citizen is covered under Ayushman Bharat schemes, health camps (Ayushman Melas)
Eligibility: All eligible citizens not yet enrolled in PM-JAY/Ayushman cards
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free enrolment camps, health check-up melas
How to Apply: Visit Ayushman Mela / Health & Wellness Centre during campaign

Scheme Name: National Tuberculosis Elimination Programme (NTEP, formerly RNTCP)
What It Covers: Free TB diagnosis (incl. drug-resistant TB), free treatment (DOTS), nutritional support via Nikshay Poshan Yojana
Eligibility: Any person with TB symptoms or diagnosed TB
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free diagnosis & medicines; Rs.500/month nutritional support during treatment
How to Apply: Visit nearest Govt hospital / Designated Microscopy Centre, register on Nikshay portal

Scheme Name: National AIDS Control Programme (NACP) / TANSACS
Launched By / Year: GoI + Tamil Nadu State AIDS Control Society
What It Covers: Free HIV testing, counselling, ART (antiretroviral therapy), prevention programmes
Eligibility: Any individual seeking HIV testing/treatment
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free testing at ICTC, free lifelong ART at ART centres
How to Apply: Visit Integrated Counselling & Testing Centre (ICTC) at Govt hospitals

Scheme Name: National Leprosy Eradication Programme (NLEP)
What It Covers: Free diagnosis and Multi-Drug Therapy (MDT) for leprosy, disability prevention
Eligibility: Anyone diagnosed with leprosy
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free MDT medicines and reconstructive surgery if needed
How to Apply: Visit Govt PHC/hospital leprosy unit

Scheme Name: National Programme for Control of Blindness & Visual Impairment (NPCB&VI) / TNSBCS
Launched By / Year: GoI, 1976; TN State Blindness Control Society since 1996
What It Covers: Free cataract surgery, eye screening, free spectacles for school children
Eligibility: All residents, priority to elderly and school children
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free cataract surgery and eye care at Govt hospitals/eye camps
How to Apply: Visit District Hospital eye dept or eye camp

Scheme Name: National Programme for Prevention & Control of Cancer, Diabetes, CVD & Stroke (NPCDCS)
What It Covers: Free screening for hypertension, diabetes, cervical & breast cancer for age 30+, lifestyle counselling
Eligibility: All individuals aged 30 years and above visiting Govt health facility
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free NCD screening and follow-up at 2,516+ Govt facilities in TN
How to Apply: Visit any Govt PHC/hospital NCD clinic

Scheme Name: National Programme for Health Care of the Elderly (NPHCE)
What It Covers: Geriatric clinics, dedicated elderly care wards at district hospitals, free medicines for elderly
Eligibility: Senior citizens (60+ years)
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free geriatric OPD, medicines, and rehabilitation aids
How to Apply: Visit District Hospital geriatric clinic

Scheme Name: District Mental Health Programme (DMHP)
What It Covers: Free psychiatric treatment, 10-bed psychiatric wards at HQ hospitals, mobile psychiatric teams, counselling
Eligibility: Anyone needing mental health support, in DMHP-implemented districts
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free psychiatric consultation, medicines, counselling
How to Apply: Visit Govt HQ Hospital psychiatric ward / weekly taluk clinic

Scheme Name: National Mental Health Programme (NMHP)
What It Covers: Mental health services integration into general healthcare, suicide prevention, awareness
Eligibility: All citizens
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free mental health consultation at integrated centres
How to Apply: Visit nearest Govt hospital mental health unit

Scheme Name: National Vector Borne Disease Control Programme (NVBDCP)
What It Covers: Free diagnosis & treatment for malaria, dengue, chikungunya, filariasis, kala-azar
Eligibility: All residents, especially in endemic areas
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free diagnostic tests and treatment at Govt facilities
How to Apply: Visit Govt PHC/hospital during outbreak season or symptoms

Scheme Name: National Iodine Deficiency Disorders Control Programme (NIDDCP)
What It Covers: Iodine deficiency monitoring, salt iodization enforcement, goitre survey
Eligibility: General population, school children
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free screening camps and iodized salt distribution monitoring
How to Apply: Through school health programme / PHC

Scheme Name: National Oral Health Programme (NOHP)
What It Covers: Free dental check-up, basic dental treatment at district level dental units
Eligibility: All residents
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free dental check-up and basic treatment at Govt Dental Units
How to Apply: Visit District Hospital Dental Unit

Scheme Name: National Organ Transplant Programme (NOTP)
What It Covers: Organ donation registration, transplant coordination, Swasth Bharat organ registry support
Eligibility: Patients needing organ transplant; voluntary donors
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Subsidised transplant coordination via Govt-notified transplant centres
How to Apply: Register via NOTTO / State Organ & Tissue Transplant Organisation (TNOS)

Scheme Name: Universal Immunization Programme (UIP) / Mission Indradhanush
What It Covers: Free vaccination for vaccine-preventable diseases for infants and pregnant women
Eligibility: Infants (0-2 yrs) and pregnant women
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free vaccines (BCG, OPV, DPT, Measles, Hepatitis-B, etc.)
How to Apply: Visit Anganwadi/PHC immunization session

Scheme Name: Integrated Disease Surveillance Programme (IDSP)
What It Covers: Disease outbreak surveillance and early warning system
Eligibility: General population (system-level programme)
Coverage Amount / Benefit: N/A - public health surveillance system
How to Apply: Reported through Govt health facility network

Scheme Name: Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana
What It Covers: Free assistive devices (hearing aids, walking sticks, wheelchairs) for elderly BPL citizens
Eligibility: Senior citizens (60+) belonging to BPL category
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free assistive living devices
How to Apply: Apply through District Social Welfare Office camps

Scheme Name: TN Construction Workers Welfare Board - Medical Assistance
What It Covers: Medical reimbursement/assistance for registered construction workers and family for hospitalization
Eligibility: Registered construction workers with TN Construction Workers Welfare Board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical assistance as per board norms (case-based)
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office with registration ID

Scheme Name: TN Construction Workers Welfare Board - Maternity Assistance
What It Covers: Maternity benefit assistance for women construction workers
Eligibility: Registered women construction workers
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Cash assistance for delivery expenses
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Fishermen Welfare Board - Group Insurance Scheme
What It Covers: Accident & hospitalization insurance cover for registered fishermen
Eligibility: Registered active fishers, member of fishers cooperative society
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Rs.2 lakh death/disability cover, Rs.1 lakh partial disability, Rs.10,000 hospitalization
How to Apply: Apply via Fisheries Dept Assistant Director office

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Fishermen Welfare Board - Saving-cum-Relief Scheme (Ban Period)
What It Covers: Financial relief to fishers during fishing ban/lean period, indirectly supports health & nutrition
Eligibility: Registered marine fishers
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Cash relief during ban period
How to Apply: Apply through Fisheries cooperative society

Scheme Name: TN Unorganised Workers' Social Security Scheme - Health Component
What It Covers: Health insurance & accident benefit for unorganised sector workers registered under e-Shram
Eligibility: Unorganised workers registered on e-Shram/TN Unorganised Workers Board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Accident insurance + access to CMCHIS-linked health benefits
How to Apply: Register on e-Shram portal / Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Domestic Workers Welfare Board - Medical Assistance
What It Covers: Medical reimbursement for registered domestic workers
Eligibility: Registered domestic workers with the welfare board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical assistance as per board norms
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Auto Rickshaw & Taxi Drivers Welfare Board - Health Scheme
What It Covers: Medical assistance and accident benefit for registered drivers
Eligibility: Registered auto/taxi drivers with the welfare board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical/accident assistance (case-based)
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Handloom Weavers' Welfare Health Scheme
What It Covers: Health insurance and medical assistance for handloom weavers
Eligibility: Registered handloom weavers under cooperative societies
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Health insurance coverage (scheme-based)
How to Apply: Apply through weavers' cooperative society

Scheme Name: TN Beedi Workers Welfare Fund - Medical Benefit
What It Covers: Medical treatment benefit for registered beedi workers
Eligibility: Registered beedi workers under Beedi Workers Welfare Fund Act
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free/subsidised medical treatment at welfare dispensaries
How to Apply: Apply through Beedi Workers Welfare Commissioner office

Scheme Name: AYUSH (Ayurveda, Yoga, Unani, Siddha, Homeopathy) Free OPD Scheme
Launched By / Year: TN Govt, Dept of Indian Medicine & Homeopathy
What It Covers: Free Siddha/Ayurveda/Homeopathy consultation and medicines at Govt AYUSH dispensaries
Eligibility: All residents
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free AYUSH consultation and medicines
How to Apply: Visit Govt Siddha/Ayurveda/Homeopathy dispensary

Scheme Name: National AYUSH Mission (NAM)
What It Covers: Strengthening AYUSH infrastructure, integrating traditional medicine into public health system
Eligibility: General public via Govt AYUSH facilities
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free/subsidised AYUSH treatment at integrated centres
How to Apply: Visit Govt AYUSH wellness centre

Scheme Name: Siddha Hospital Free Treatment Scheme (Govt Siddha Medical College, Chennai)
What It Covers: Free Siddha treatment, including for chronic skin and joint conditions
Eligibility: All patients
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free OPD/IPD Siddha treatment
How to Apply: Walk-in at Govt Siddha Medical College Hospital, Arumbakkam

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Blood Transfusion Council - Free Blood Scheme
What It Covers: Free blood units for thalassemia, haemophilia, and BPL patients at Govt blood banks
Eligibility: Thalassemia/haemophilia patients, BPL cardholders
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free blood units, blood component therapy
How to Apply: Visit Govt blood bank with prescription

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Government Free Diagnostic Services Scheme
What It Covers: Free laboratory tests, X-ray, ultrasound, CT at Govt hospitals under NHM free diagnostics initiative
Eligibility: All patients visiting Govt hospitals
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free diagnostic tests as per scheme list
How to Apply: Avail at Govt hospital diagnostic centre

Scheme Name: Free Drug Distribution Scheme - Tamil Nadu Medical Services Corporation (TNMSC)
What It Covers: Free essential medicines distribution to all Govt hospitals across TN
Eligibility: All patients at Govt hospitals
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free essential medicines
How to Apply: Available automatically at Govt hospital pharmacy

Scheme Name: Kalaignar Kappagam Free Lunch-cum-Nutrition Scheme for Patients (Govt Hospital Canteens)
What It Covers: Subsidised/free nutritious meals for patients and attendants admitted in Govt hospitals
Eligibility: Inpatients and attendants at Govt hospitals
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free or Re.1 subsidised meals
How to Apply: Available at hospital Amma Unavagam/canteen counters

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Differently-Abled Persons Health & Rehabilitation Scheme
Launched By / Year: TN Govt, Welfare of Differently-Abled Dept
What It Covers: Free assistive devices, corrective surgery, rehabilitation support
Eligibility: Persons with disabilities registered under TN welfare schemes
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free aids/appliances, surgery assistance
How to Apply: Apply at District Differently-Abled Welfare Office
Official Source / Helpline: TN Dept for Welfare of Differently-Abled Persons

Scheme Name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (IGNDPS)
Launched By / Year: Govt of India + TN, social welfare
What It Covers: Monthly pension support to severely disabled persons, indirectly supports healthcare costs
Eligibility: Persons with 80%+ disability, BPL households
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Monthly pension (amount per state norms)
How to Apply: Apply at Taluk Social Welfare Office

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Old Age Pension Scheme (Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension - IGNOAPS)
What It Covers: Monthly pension for elderly poor, supports access to medical needs
Eligibility: Senior citizens 60+ years, BPL households
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Monthly pension (state-revised amount)
How to Apply: Apply at Taluk Social Welfare Office / VAO

Scheme Name: Free Ambulance for Pregnant Women - Amma Vodi / Pregnancy Transport Scheme
What It Covers: Free transport for pregnant women to hospital for delivery and emergency obstetric care
Eligibility: Pregnant women in rural/semi-urban TN
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free pickup and drop transport
How to Apply: Call 108 / coordinate via ASHA worker

Scheme Name: TN Government Employees & Pensioners Health Fund Scheme (TNGEPHFS / NHIS)
What It Covers: Cashless/reimbursement health insurance for state govt employees and pensioners
Eligibility: TN Govt serving employees and pensioners
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Cashless treatment up to scheme-defined limit at empanelled hospitals
How to Apply: Enrol through respective department's DDO

Scheme Name: Mukhyamantri Vdestha Yojana style District Headquarters Hospital Upgradation Scheme
What It Covers: Upgrading district hospitals with ICUs, trauma care, specialist departments
Eligibility: All residents of respective district
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Improved free specialist care at upgraded district hospitals
How to Apply: Avail directly at upgraded District Headquarters Hospital

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Snake-bite & Animal-bite Free Treatment Scheme
What It Covers: Free anti-snake venom (ASV) and anti-rabies vaccine (ARV) treatment at all Govt hospitals/PHCs
Eligibility: Any patient with snake bite or animal bite
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free ASV/ARV vaccines and treatment
How to Apply: Visit nearest Govt PHC/hospital immediately

Scheme Name: National Programme on Prevention & Management of Burn Injuries (NPPMBI)
What It Covers: Free burn injury treatment, prevention awareness, and specialised burns ward facilities
Eligibility: Burn injury patients at notified Govt hospitals
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free emergency and reconstructive treatment for burns
How to Apply: Visit Govt hospital burns ward

Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
What It Covers: Cash incentive for pregnant and lactating women for first living child to compensate wage loss
Eligibility: Pregnant/lactating women (first child), excludes govt employees
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Rs.5,000 in installments (cash incentive)
How to Apply: Apply via Anganwadi Centre with required documents

Scheme Name: Mission Indradhanush 4.0 (Intensified)
What It Covers: Catch-up vaccination drive for unvaccinated/partially vaccinated children and pregnant women in low-coverage areas
Eligibility: Children 0-2 yrs and pregnant women in target districts/blocks
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free catch-up vaccination
How to Apply: Through scheduled IMI rounds at Anganwadi/PHC

Scheme Name: Kayakalp Award Scheme (Swachh Swasth Sarvatra)
What It Covers: Incentivises Govt health facilities for cleanliness, hygiene, infection control standards
Eligibility: Public health facilities (system-level, indirect patient benefit via cleaner hospitals)
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Recognition + funding for facilities meeting Kayakalp standards
How to Apply: N/A - facility-level certification scheme

Scheme Name: LaQshya (Labour Room Quality Improvement Initiative)
What It Covers: Improving quality of care in labour rooms and maternity OTs in Govt hospitals
Eligibility: Pregnant women delivering at Govt facilities
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Improved safe-delivery care standards at certified facilities
How to Apply: Avail at LaQshya-certified Govt hospital maternity ward

Scheme Name: SUMAN (Surakshit Matritva Aashwasan)
What It Covers: Assured free and dignified maternal and newborn healthcare with zero tolerance for denial of services
Eligibility: All pregnant women and newborns up to 6 months, including up to 1 year for sick infants
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free, no-denial maternal & newborn care at Govt facilities
How to Apply: Avail at any Govt health facility, toll-free helpline available

Scheme Name: eSanjeevani Telemedicine Scheme
What It Covers: Free online doctor consultation (OPD) via telemedicine for patients in remote areas
Eligibility: All residents, especially in rural/remote areas
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free teleconsultation with Govt doctors
How to Apply: Register on eSanjeevani app/portal

Scheme Name: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM) / ABHA Health ID
What It Covers: Digital health ID for unified health records, linking across hospitals and schemes
Eligibility: All Indian citizens
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free digital health record creation and linkage
How to Apply: Register via ABHA app or at Govt hospital registration desk

Scheme Name: TN Sand/Stone Quarry Workers Welfare Board - Medical Assistance
What It Covers: Medical reimbursement for registered quarry workers
Eligibility: Registered quarry/mine workers
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical assistance as per board norms
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Tailoring Workers Welfare Board - Health Scheme
What It Covers: Medical assistance for registered tailoring workers
Eligibility: Registered tailoring workers under welfare board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical assistance (case-based)
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Goldsmith Workers Welfare Board - Medical Benefit
What It Covers: Medical assistance for registered goldsmiths/jewellery workers
Eligibility: Registered goldsmith workers under welfare board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical assistance (case-based)
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Washermen (Vannar) Welfare Board - Health Scheme
What It Covers: Medical assistance for registered washermen community workers
Eligibility: Registered washermen under welfare board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical assistance (case-based)
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Barber (Hairdressers) Welfare Board - Medical Scheme
What It Covers: Medical assistance for registered barbers/hairdressers
Eligibility: Registered workers under welfare board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical assistance (case-based)
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Palm Tree Workers (Tappers) Welfare Board - Health Scheme
What It Covers: Medical assistance for registered toddy/palm tappers
Eligibility: Registered palm tree workers under welfare board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical assistance (case-based)
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Artisans (Kammala) Welfare Board - Medical Assistance
What It Covers: Medical assistance for registered traditional artisans
Eligibility: Registered artisans under welfare board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical assistance (case-based)
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Drivers (Cine/Theatre) Welfare Board - Health Scheme
What It Covers: Medical assistance for registered cinema/theatre workers
Eligibility: Registered workers under welfare board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical assistance (case-based)
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: TN Footwear & Leather Goods Manufacturing Workers Welfare Board - Health Scheme
What It Covers: Medical assistance for registered leather/footwear workers
Eligibility: Registered workers under welfare board
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Medical assistance (case-based)
How to Apply: Apply at Labour Welfare Office

Scheme Name: Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) - Medical Pension Component
Launched By / Year: Govt of India, Ministry of Labour
What It Covers: Disability pension and medical-linked benefits for EPF subscribers
Eligibility: EPF/EPS scheme members
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Pension and disability benefit (scheme-based)
How to Apply: Apply via EPFO member portal

Scheme Name: Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana (RSBY) - Legacy Coverage
Launched By / Year: Govt of India, 2008 (subsumed into PM-JAY in many states)
What It Covers: Cashless hospitalization for BPL families (legacy scheme, largely merged into PM-JAY)
Eligibility: BPL families originally enrolled under RSBY
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Up to Rs.30,000 per family per year (legacy cover)
How to Apply: Check legacy card validity / migrate to PM-JAY

Scheme Name: National Programme for Healthcare of Persons with Sickle Cell Disease (NHM Mission Mode)
What It Covers: Universal screening for sickle cell disease in tribal-dominated districts, counselling and management
Eligibility: Tribal population in mission districts, all age groups
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free screening, genetic counselling and management
How to Apply: Through tribal block PHC/screening camps

Scheme Name: National Programme for Control & Treatment of Occupational Diseases
Launched By / Year: Govt of India, Ministry of Labour
What It Covers: Occupational health screening and treatment for industrial/factory workers
Eligibility: Registered factory and industrial workers
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free occupational health screening
How to Apply: Through ESIC/factory medical inspectorate

Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY) - Nutrition Support
What It Covers: Free additional foodgrains to support nutrition of poor households (supports overall health outcomes)
Eligibility: BPL/Antyodaya ration cardholders
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free additional foodgrains via ration shops
How to Apply: Avail through Fair Price Shop with ration card

Scheme Name: Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) - Health & Nutrition Component
What It Covers: Supplementary nutrition, health check-ups, immunization, growth monitoring for children under 6 and mothers
Eligibility: Children 0-6 yrs, pregnant & lactating women
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free supplementary nutrition and health check-ups
How to Apply: Through local Anganwadi Centre

Scheme Name: POSHAN Abhiyaan (National Nutrition Mission)
What It Covers: Reducing stunting, undernutrition, anemia among children, adolescent girls, pregnant/lactating women
Eligibility: Children, adolescent girls, pregnant/lactating women
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Convergent nutrition services, growth monitoring, IFA supplementation
How to Apply: Through Anganwadi Centre under ICDS

Scheme Name: Scheme for Adolescent Girls (SAG) / Saksham Anganwadi
What It Covers: Nutrition, health check-up and life-skill education for out-of-school adolescent girls
Eligibility: Out-of-school adolescent girls aged 11-14 years
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free nutrition supplement and health screening
How to Apply: Through local Anganwadi Centre

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Government IVF / Infertility Treatment Support Scheme
Launched By / Year: TN Govt, select Govt Medical College Hospitals
What It Covers: Subsidised infertility evaluation and IVF treatment at Govt medical college hospitals
Eligibility: Eligible couples referred through Govt hospital gynaecology dept
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Subsidised IVF/infertility treatment package
How to Apply: Referral via Govt Medical College Hospital Gynaecology OPD

Scheme Name: Tamil Nadu Free Hearing Aid Distribution Scheme (ADIP-linked)
What It Covers: Free hearing aids and ENT screening for hearing-impaired persons
Eligibility: BPL/disabled persons with hearing impairment
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free hearing aids and devices
How to Apply: Apply through District Disability Welfare Office / ADIP camp

Scheme Name: Assistance to Disabled Persons for Purchase/Fitting of Aids & Appliances (ADIP Scheme)
Launched By / Year: Govt of India, Ministry of Social Justice
What It Covers: Free/subsidised aids and appliances (wheelchairs, calipers, artificial limbs, hearing aids) for persons with disabilities
Eligibility: Persons with disabilities, income-based eligibility
Coverage Amount / Benefit: Free to highly subsidised assistive devices
How to Apply: Apply through District Disability Welfare camp / NGO implementing agency
